title: Christmas on Vinegar Hill
subtitle: 36th Annual • Saturday, November 21, 2026

entries.name: Mt. Pulaski Courthouse State Historic Site
entries.description: Warm refreshments, festive treats, and Christmas décor.

entries.name: Salt Creek Crafters – American Legion Home
entries.description: Crafts, antiques, florals, clothing, soaps, candles, jewelry, Pampered Chef, wood, and holiday goods.

entries.name: Mt. Pulaski High School
entries.description: 60+ vendors, crafts, homemade goods, and direct market sales.

entries.name: Vinegar Hill Treasure Chest
entries.description: Antiques, repurposed furniture, wood crafts, vintage, handmade, and miscellaneous goods.

entries.name: Topper’s Storage – Complete Storage Solutions
entries.description: Large indoor shopping with Christmas décor, gifts, and multiple food trucks.

entries.name: Mt. Pulaski Public Library
entries.description: Annual book sale. Free donuts and hot drinks.

entries.name: Mt. Pulaski Grade School
entries.description: 60+ vendors, cookie walk, walking tacos, sloppy joes, and hot dogs.

entries.name: Mt. Pulaski Courthouse Gazebo
entries.description: Gazebo decorated for Christmas photo ops.

entries.name: Chestnut Fire Dept.
entries.description: Crafts, bake sale, jewelry, and more.

entries.name: The Talk of the Town
entries.description: Restaurant and bar with good food and drinks.

entries.name: BB’s BFE Bar & Grill
entries.description: Restaurant and bar with hot food, cold drinks, and vendors.

footerNotes: Look for the tree sign for participating locations.
Visit a location with the bag symbol and receive a reusable shopping bag with any donation while supplies last.
Follow Facebook and cityofmtpulaski.com for updates and vendor listings.
sponsors: Mt. Pulaski Economic Development & Planning Board
Community Foundation for the Land of Lincoln
Land & Home Real Estate & Property Management
